message:
fix(events): serialize json.Encoder calls in EnableRobotMode

EnableRobotMode shares a single json.Encoder across handler goroutines
spawned by Publish. Since json.Encoder.Encode is not thread-safe,
concurrent calls could corrupt the JSON stream.

Fix: Add a mutex to serialize Encode calls.
